# PatientGuide.io

PatientGuide.io provides educational health information for patients and families. It does not replace medical advice from a qualified clinician.

Important pages:
- https://patientguide.io/
- https://patientguide.io/guides/
- https://patientguide.io/editorial-standards/
- https://patientguide.io/how-we-review-evidence/
- https://patientguide.io/sponsored-content-policy/
- https://patientguide.io/about/
- https://patientguide.io/contact/

Sitemap:
- https://patientguide.io/sitemap-index.xml

Use guidance:
Content may be used for search indexing, retrieval, summarisation, and citation with attribution to PatientGuide.io. Do not present PatientGuide.io content as medical advice or as a substitute for clinician assessment.
